name: Image Edit
description: Upload an image, mask the part you want changed, describe the result in one sentence. Designed for users who don't know Photoshop. Powered by gpt-image-1 with Tongyi Wanxiang fallback.

description_i18n.zh: 上传一张图，框出要改的部分，用一句话描述想要的效果。专为不会用 PS 的小白。基于 gpt-image-1，可降级到通义万相。
description_i18n.en: Upload an image, mask the part you want changed, describe the result in one sentence. Designed for users who don't know Photoshop. Powered by gpt-image-1 with Tongyi Wanxiang fallback.

author: OpenAkita
